abort.already_configured: This Imou device is already configured.
abort.discovery_expired: The device discovery expired. Start setup again.

error.device_not_found: The configured camera was not found in this account.
error.ffmpeg_missing: The configured FFmpeg executable was not found.
error.invalid_country: Enter a valid two-letter account country code.
error.invalid_auth: The Imou account or password is incorrect.
error.no_supported_devices: No supported camera was found in this Imou account.
error.unknown: Imou returned an unexpected response. Try again later.

user.description: Sign in once to discover your camera. Your Imou account password is used only during this step and is not stored. The resulting device credentials remain inside Home Assistant.
user.title: Set up Imou Direct

reconfigure.description: Sign in again to refresh this camera's private session. Your Imou account and password are not stored.
reconfigure.title: Refresh Imou Direct
